pagetext.p: Rivetweb requires Apache HTTP Webserver 2.2 with Apache Rivet >= 2.0.1. It is also recommended you use Tcl >= 8.5 with Rivet as current implementation of hidden data structures rely heavily on Tcl's dict command. Current implementation of Rivet also uses tdom to manipulate XML and XHTML code.
As of today Rivetweb hasn't released any artifact, so you if you want to test it you have to clone the code from the git repository
Rivetweb is still very unstable and under active development. You can have new updates of your code by pulling them from repository
Se the documentation for you OS to see how to install Apache HTTP Server, Tcl, tdom and git.
